DI_can_employ_selected_court_position = {
    switch = {
        trigger = scope:court_position_type
        court_position_type:akolouthos_court_position = {
            can_employ_court_position_type = akolouthos_court_position
        }
        court_position_type:antiquarian_court_position = {
            can_employ_court_position_type = antiquarian_court_position

        court_position_type:yurtchi_court_position = {

        }
        fallback = { always = no }
    }
}

DI_should_use_ordered_court_position_revoke = {
    switch = {
        trigger = scope:court_position_type
        court_position_type:bodyguard_court_position = {
            any_court_position_holder = {
                type = bodyguard_court_position
                count >= 2
            }
        }
        court_position_type:court_artificer_court_position = {
            any_court_position_holder = {
                type = court_artificer_court_position
                count >= 3
            }
        }
        court_position_type:garuda_court_position = {
            any_court_position_holder = {
                type = garuda_court_position
                count >= 2
            }
        }
        court_position_type:lady_in_waiting_court_position = {
            any_court_position_holder = {
                type = lady_in_waiting_court_position
                count >= 2
            }
        }
        court_position_type:minister_bureaucrat_court_position = {
            any_court_position_holder = {
                type = minister_bureaucrat_court_position
                count >= 2
            }
        }
        fallback = { always = no }
    }
}
